content: Define the module interface including all input and output ports as specified in the original problem description. This includes setting up the module declaration with the correct port names and data types.
source: Implement the same interface and behavior as `original.txt`.

content: Implement the sequential logic for registering the input signal. This involves creating a register to store the input value and updating this register on the positive edge of the clock. Include reset functionality to set the register to zero when the reset signal is active.
source: The module should implement an 8-bit registered incrementer. The 8-bit input is first registered and then incremented by one on the next cycle.

content: Implement the combinational logic to increment the registered value. This involves creating a wire or logic variable that takes the value of the registered input, increments it by one, and assigns this value to the output port.
source: The module should implement an 8-bit registered incrementer. The 8-bit input is first registered and then incremented by one on the next cycle.
